data.description: Tesla Invites Shareholder Who Made First Proper Submission on XAI to Attend Shareholder Meeting in Person

data.title: Nabors Industries Ltd. appoints David J. Tudor as new board director, expanding total members to eight.
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda on July 25, 2025, Nabors Industries Ltd. revealed that they have increased their Board size to eight members as of July 24, 2025, with the addition of David J. Tudor to the team. Mr. Tudor's appointment brings the total board membership to eight. Nabors Industries Ltd., traded on the NYSE under the symbol NBR, made this strategic decision to strengthen its leadership team.

data.title: Uniform Advantage launches GREY'S ANATOMY™ EMERGE Collection for medical professionals, bringing modern design and purposeful performance.
data.description: A new collection called GREY'S ANATOMY™ by Barco EMERGE has been introduced by Uniform Advantage in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on July 25, 2025. This collection is aimed at medical professionals and is the latest innovation in healthcare uniforms. Uniform Advantage is a top retailer of medical apparel that operates through multiple channels.

data.title: PharmAla Biotech Holdings Inc. released its Q3 financial statements, showing customer deposits grew by $150,463, with $79,558 revenue recognized.
data.description: PharmAla Biotech Holdings Inc. has reported its financial and operational results for the period ending May 31, 2025. The company's unaudited condensed interim consolidated financial statements show customer deposits increased by $150,463 in Q3, with revenues recognized at $79,558. The reopening of Canada's distribution led to increased volume in Q2 and Q3 compared to the previous fiscal year. A large shipment of LaNeo MDMA has been delivered to US clinical trial customers. Manufacturing in Australia for 40mg LaNeo Capsules has been completed, benefiting future operations. The full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: A historic Bitcoin whale cashed out $9 billion in a significant sale conducted by Galaxy on Friday.
data.description: A $9 billion Bitcoin sale was facilitated by Galaxy for a whale from the Satoshi era, as disclosed on Friday. Details on this significant exit have been revealed.

data.title: Florida Teamsters at Southern Glazer's Wine & Spirits secure better pay, benefits, protections for 270+ workers in Lakeland.
data.description: In Lakeland, Florida, on July 25, 2025, it was reported that more than 270 warehouse employees at Southern Glazer's Wine & Spirits, represented by Teamsters Local 79, have successfully voted in favor of their initial collective bargaining agreement. This agreement ensures improved pay, benefits, and job protections for the workers.

data.title: Eshallgo Inc. receives Nasdaq notice about low stock price for 30 days. No immediate impact on Nasdaq listing. NASDAQ:EHGO.
data.description: On July 23, 2025, Eshallgo, Inc. (NASDAQ: EHGO) received notice from Nasdaq that for the past 30 consecutive business days, the closing bid price of the company’s class A ordinary shares fell below the minimum bid price of US$1.00 per share as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). This notification from Nasdaq does not currently impact the listing or trading of Eshallgo’s class A ordinary shares on the exchange.

data.title: ECN Capital to release Q2-2025 financials on August 7, 2025. The report covers the three-month period ended June 30, 2025.
data.description: In Toronto on July 25, 2025, ECN Capital Corp. (TSX: ECN) revealed plans to release its financial statements and management discussion and analysis for the quarter ending June 30, 2025, on Thursday, August 7, 2025, after markets close.

data.title: Fannie Mae to release Q2 2025 results on July 30, 2025. Webcast to follow. Washington, Company Ticker: FNMA.
data.description: A corporation based in Washington, Fannie Mae (OTCQB: FNMA), is set to announce its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 on July 30, 2025, before the U.S. financial markets open. A webcast has been planned by Fannie Mae to analyze this report.

data.title: Birks Group Inc. reports fiscal 2025 results: net sales $177.8M, down 4%, gross profit $66.3M, down 37.3%, operating loss $5.5M.
data.description: Birks Group Inc. reported its financial results for the fiscal year ended March 29, 2025. Total net sales were $177.8 million, a 4.0% decrease from the previous year. Comparable store sales dropped by 3.4%, mainly due to lower sales of branded jewelry following the exit of a brand from two stores. Excluding the brand exit, comparable store sales increased by 6.9%, driven by timepiece sales. Gross profit was $66.3 million, 37.3% of net sales, down from $73.6 million in fiscal 2024. Adjusted EBITDA for 2025 was $9.2 million, down from $10.0 million in 2024. The company reported a net loss of $12.8 million for 2025, compared to a net loss of $4.6 million in 2024. Birks Group operates 17 stores under the Maison Birks brand and multiple other retail locations across Canada.

data.title: Fairfax Financial Holdings to host call at 8:30am on August 1 to discuss 2025 second quarter results. Access at 1 (800) 369-2143.
data.description: Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited is scheduled to host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on Friday, August 1, 2025, to discuss its second-quarter results of 2025. These results are set to be disclosed after markets close on Thursday, July 31, 2025. The conference call will consist of a company presentation followed by a question period. For those interested, the information will be available on their website, www.fairfax.ca. To join the call, dial 1 (800) 369-2143 (for Canada and U.S. callers) or 1 (312) 470-0063 (for International callers) using the passcode “FAIRFAX”. Keep in mind, Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited trades on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the tickers TSX: FFH and FFH.U.

data.title: NJ leveraging capital from GSVP for healthcare innovation, marking new era for state's economy.
data.description: A significant development in Glassboro, New Jersey highlights a turning point for the state's innovation economy through two major healthcare announcements. GSVP emerges as a crucial player in these milestones, serving as a key catalyst for progress.

data.title: Grupo Simec reports half-year earnings, net sales drop compared to last year. - Guadalajara, Mexico, July 25, 2025.
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, on July 25, 2025, leading steel manufacturer Grupo Simec, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: SIM) shared its operational performance for the six-month period concluding on June 30, 2025. A comparative analysis was presented for the first half of 2025 in comparison to the same period in 2024. Key findings indicate a decrease in net sales for this period.

data.title: First Capital, Inc. reported a quarterly net income of $3.8 million, up from $2.8 million the prior year. Total assets increased to $1.24 billion from $1.19 billion. Nonperforming assets decreased from $4.5 million to $4.0 million.
data.description: First Capital, Inc. reported a net income of $3.8 million, or $1.13 per diluted share, for the quarter ended June 30, 2025, up from $2.8 million, or $0.85 per diluted share, for the same period in 2024. Net interest income after provision for credit losses increased by $1.8 million to $10.4 million, with interest income rising due to a higher yield and balance of interest-earning assets. Noninterest income decreased slightly, and noninterest expenses increased by $494,000. For the six months ended June 30, 2025, net income was $7.0 million, compared to $5.8 million in 2024. Total assets increased to $1.24 billion from $1.19 billion in December 2024. Deposits rose to $1.11 billion, and nonperforming assets decreased to $4.0 million from $4.5 million. The Bank operates in 17 offices across Indiana and Kentucky.

data.title: Calidi Biotherapeutics to implement 1-for-12 Reverse Stock Split on August 5, 2025; trading under symbol "CLDI." New CUSIP: 320703 408.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, Calidi Biotherapeutics, Inc. revealed plans for a reverse stock split of its common stock at a ratio of 1-for-12. The company, listed on NYSE American under the symbol "CLDI," is a biotech firm advancing targeted therapies for genetic medicine delivery to distant disease sites. The split-adjusted trading of its common stock is set to begin on August 5, 2025, with the new CUSIP number being 320703 408.
